title: stelis prolificosa
intro: Stelis prolificosa, also known as the Orange Hill Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis prolificosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Stelis prolificosa typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical applications for medicinal purposes.
